---
title: "Teaching"
subtitle: "Teaching and supervision"
title-block-banner: false
---

## Current Teaching

### Transport Data Science (TDS)
- **Level**: Masters module (MSc)
- **Institution**: University of Leeds, Institute for Transport Studies
- **Since**: 2020
- **Description**: Teaching data science methods for transport research and planning, covering R programming, spatial analysis, reproducibility, and transport modelling.
- **Resources**: [GitHub](https://github.com/ITSLeeds/tds)
- **Related courses**: Data Science and Data Analytics MSc, Urban Data Science and Analytics MSc

### Past Teaching
- **Geographic Data Science**: University of Leeds (2016-2019)
- **Introduction to R**: Various workshops (2015-present)

---

## Supervision

I supervise PhD and Masters students on topics related to:
- Active travel and cycling infrastructure
- Transport modelling and simulation
- Geocomputation and spatial data analysis
- Reproducible research methods

Current and past students can be found on the [people](/people/) page.

---

## Training Materials

I regularly deliver workshops on:
- R for transport analysis
- Spatial data processing with sf andigraph
- Reproducible research with Quarto/R Markdown
- Git and GitHub for academics

See [GitHub](https://github.com/robinlovelace) for training materials and code examples.
